goal: Move all byte-swapping helper methods into EndianUtilsSwap to centralize low-level bitwise conversion logic and further shrink EndianUtils.

ops.details: Move the swap* method bodies from EndianUtils into EndianUtilsSwap. Ensure EndianUtilsSwap has public static methods with the same signatures. Adjust implementations if they previously referenced private helpers now moved to other classes. Keep semantics identical. Note: EndianUtils already references EndianUtilsSwap; this consolidates swap logic in that class.

Update related tests affected by this refactoring block so the configured build command passes. Adjust imports, package references, moved class references, constructors, and assertions only when required. Do not change production behavior through tests.
